title: Warehouse (WHS): work template resolution and a work-creation slice
instruction: In the sandbox model, build the X++ half of a warehouse work slice. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="warehouse-management"). SCOPE LIMIT: work templates and location directives are configured data, not AOT elements - they are out of scope. Create a class DemoWhsWorkService with public static methods: (1) `WHSWorkId createWorkForLoad(WHSLoadId _loadId)` - resolves the applicable work template through the WHS work-template API and creates work via the WHSWorkCreate/WHSWorkBuild path taught by the knowledge entry, inside ttsbegin/ttscommit; (2) `boolean isWorkClosed(WHSWorkId _workId)` - reads the work header status through the WHS tables with an indexed, firstonly select. Inserting into WHSWorkTable/WHSWorkLine directly FAILS this case: work must be created through the framework so templates and directives apply. Confirm every WHS class and member signature with search/get_method before writing it - do not guess. The class must build with zero BP errors.
